apple.definition: A round fruit with red, yellow, or green skin and crunchy white flesh inside.
apple.sentence_blank: I ate a crisp red _____ for my afternoon snack.
apple.sentence_full: I ate a crisp red apple for my afternoon snack.

adventure.sentence_blank: We went on a grand _____ in the forest.
adventure.sentence_full: We went on a grand adventure in the forest.

knowledge.definition: Information, skills, and understanding that you have learned.
knowledge.sentence_blank: Reading books helps you gain more _____.
knowledge.sentence_full: Reading books helps you gain more knowledge.

comfortable.definition: Feeling relaxed and physically at ease.
comfortable.sentence_blank: This chair is very _____ to sit in.
comfortable.sentence_full: This chair is very comfortable to sit in.

dangerous.definition: Likely to cause harm or injury.
dangerous.sentence_blank: It is _____ to play with fire.
dangerous.sentence_full: It is dangerous to play with fire.

curious.definition: Wanting to learn or know more about something.

curious.sentence_full: The curious cat looked inside the box.

incredible.definition: Something that is hard to believe because it is so good or amazing.

incredible.sentence_full: The view from the mountain was incredible.

vocabulary.sentence_full: Learning new words helps grow your vocabulary.

friendship.definition: The relationship between two people who like each other.

friendship.sentence_full: Their friendship has lasted for many years.

remember.definition: To bring back to your mind something you learned or saw before.
remember.sentence_blank: Please _____ to bring your homework tomorrow.
remember.sentence_full: Please remember to bring your homework tomorrow.

excellent.definition: Extremely good or of very high quality.
excellent.sentence_blank: You did an _____ job on your project.
excellent.sentence_full: You did an excellent job on your project.

different.definition: Not the same as another person or thing.
different.sentence_full: Every snowflake has a different shape.

intelligent.definition: Being able to learn and understand things quickly.

environment.definition: The natural world around us, like the air, water, and land.
environment.sentence_blank: We should work to protect our _____.
environment.sentence_full: We should work to protect our environment.

imagination.definition: The ability to create new ideas or pictures in your mind.
imagination.sentence_blank: Use your _____ to draw a magical creature.
imagination.sentence_full: Use your imagination to draw a magical creature.

celebration.definition: A party or special event to honor something happy.
celebration.sentence_blank: We had a big _____ for my birthday.
celebration.sentence_full: We had a big celebration for my birthday.

responsible.definition: Being able to be trusted to do what is right.
responsible.sentence_blank: It is _____ to finish your chores on time.
responsible.sentence_full: It is responsible to finish your chores on time.

photographer.definition: A person who takes pictures with a camera.

photographer.sentence_full: The photographer took a picture of the sunset.

electricity.definition: A form of energy that powers lights and machines.

electricity.sentence_full: The electricity went out during the storm.

encyclopedia.definition: A book or website that has facts about many different topics.
encyclopedia.sentence_blank: I looked up facts about space in the _____.
encyclopedia.sentence_full: I looked up facts about space in the encyclopedia.

conversation.definition: A talk between two or more people.
conversation.sentence_blank: We had a nice _____ over lunch.
conversation.sentence_full: We had a nice conversation over lunch.

beautifully.definition: In a way that is very pleasing to look at or hear.
beautifully.sentence_blank: The choir sang _____ at the concert.
beautifully.sentence_full: The choir sang beautifully at the concert.

carefully.definition: Doing something with a lot of attention to avoid mistakes.
carefully.sentence_blank: Please walk _____ on the icy sidewalk.
carefully.sentence_full: Please walk carefully on the icy sidewalk.

education.definition: The process of learning and gaining knowledge at school.
education.sentence_blank: A good _____ is important for your future.
education.sentence_full: A good education is important for your future.

information.sentence_blank: The library has a lot of _____ about history.
information.sentence_full: The library has a lot of information about history.

delicious.sentence_blank: The cake my mom baked was _____.
delicious.sentence_full: The cake my mom baked was delicious.

important.definition: Something that has great value or meaning.
important.sentence_blank: It is _____ to eat healthy food.
important.sentence_full: It is important to eat healthy food.

necessary.definition: Something that is needed to get a job done.

necessary.sentence_full: Water is necessary for plants to grow.

surprised.definition: Feeling shocked or amazed by something unexpected.
surprised.sentence_blank: I was _____ when my friend visited me.
surprised.sentence_full: I was surprised when my friend visited me.

suddenly.definition: Happening very quickly and without warning.
suddenly.sentence_full: Suddenly it started to rain outside.

tomorrow.sentence_blank: We are going to the park _____.
tomorrow.sentence_full: We are going to the park tomorrow.

champion.definition: A person who wins a competition.

champion.sentence_full: The team became the champion after winning the game.

scientist.definition: A person who studies the world through experiments and observation.

scientist.sentence_full: The scientist studied the stars through a telescope.

engineer.definition: A person who designs and builds machines or structures.

engineer.sentence_full: The engineer designed a new type of bridge.

discovery.definition: Finding something that was not known before.
discovery.sentence_full: The scientist made an amazing discovery.

calendar.definition: A chart that shows the days, weeks, and months of the year.

calendar.sentence_full: I marked my birthday on the calendar.

geography.definition: The study of the Earth's land, water, and countries.

geography.sentence_full: In geography class, we learned about different continents.

language.definition: A system of words used by people to communicate.

language.sentence_full: Spanish is a beautiful language to learn.

museum.sentence_full: We saw dinosaur bones at the museum.

restaurant.sentence_full: We went to a pizza restaurant for dinner.

universe.definition: Everything that exists, including all stars and planets.

universe.sentence_full: The universe is so big that we cannot see the end of it.

butterfly.definition: An insect with large, colorful wings.
butterfly.sentence_full: The butterfly landed on the flower.

basketball.definition: A game played with a ball and a hoop.

basketball.sentence_full: I love playing basketball with my friends.

chocolate.sentence_full: I had a piece of chocolate for dessert.

collection.definition: A group of similar things kept together.

collection.sentence_full: He has a large collection of stamps.

direction.definition: The path or way something is moving.
direction.sentence_blank: Which _____ should we go to find the park?
direction.sentence_full: Which direction should we go to find the park?

excitement.definition: A feeling of being very happy and eager.

excitement.sentence_full: There was a lot of excitement before the school trip.

fantastic.sentence_blank: You did a _____ job on your drawing.
fantastic.sentence_full: You did a fantastic job on your drawing.

generation.definition: All the people born and living at about the same time.
generation.sentence_blank: My grandparents belong to a different _____ than me.
generation.sentence_full: My grandparents belong to a different generation than me.

happiness.sentence_blank: Seeing my friends brought me so much _____.
happiness.sentence_full: Seeing my friends brought me so much happiness.

instrument.definition: A tool used to make music.

instrument.sentence_full: The piano is my favorite musical instrument.

journalist.definition: A person who writes news stories for newspapers or TV.

journalist.sentence_full: The journalist interviewed the mayor for the news.

kangaroo.definition: An animal from Australia that jumps on its back legs.

kangaroo.sentence_full: The kangaroo carried its baby in a pouch.

lightning.definition: A flash of light in the sky during a storm.

lightning.sentence_full: We saw a bright flash of lightning during the storm.

mysterious.definition: Something that is hard to explain or understand.

mysterious.sentence_full: We heard a mysterious noise in the attic.

neighborhood.definition: The area where you live and the people who live nearby.

neighborhood.sentence_full: There are many children in our neighborhood.

opportunity.definition: A good chance to do something.

opportunity.sentence_full: This is a great opportunity to learn something new.

passenger.sentence_full: The passenger looked out the window of the train.

questionnaire.definition: A list of questions used to gather information.

questionnaire.sentence_full: We filled out a questionnaire about our favorite foods.

refrigerator.definition: A machine that keeps food cold.
refrigerator.sentence_blank: Please put the milk back in the _____.
refrigerator.sentence_full: Please put the milk back in the refrigerator.

strawberry.sentence_blank: I love eating a fresh _____ in the summer.
strawberry.sentence_full: I love eating a fresh strawberry in the summer.

temperature.definition: A measure of how hot or cold something is.
temperature.sentence_blank: The _____ outside is very cold today.
temperature.sentence_full: The temperature outside is very cold today.

umbrella.definition: An object used to keep you dry in the rain.

umbrella.sentence_full: Don't forget your umbrella when you go outside.

vegetarian.definition: A person who does not eat meat.

vegetarian.sentence_full: My friend is a vegetarian so she eats lots of vegetables.

watermelon.definition: A large, sweet fruit with a green skin and red inside.

watermelon.sentence_full: We ate a juicy watermelon at the picnic.

xylophone.sentence_full: I played a happy tune on the xylophone.

youthful.sentence_full: She has a very youthful spirit even though she is old.

zoologist.sentence_full: The zoologist observed the lions in the wild.

communication.definition: The act of sharing information or feelings.

communication.sentence_full: Good communication is important for working in a team.

motivation.definition: The reason why you want to do something.

motivation.sentence_full: His motivation for studying is to become a doctor.

nutrition.definition: The process of getting the right food for health.
nutrition.sentence_full: Good nutrition helps you grow strong.

observation.definition: The act of watching something carefully.
observation.sentence_blank: My _____ was that the plant grew faster in the sun.
observation.sentence_full: My observation was that the plant grew faster in the sun.

population.definition: The number of people living in a place.
population.sentence_blank: The _____ of the city is growing every year.
population.sentence_full: The population of the city is growing every year.

revolution.definition: A big change in the way things are done.

revolution.sentence_full: The invention of the computer caused a revolution in how we work.

scholarship.definition: Money given to a student to help pay for school.
scholarship.sentence_blank: She won a _____ because she is a great student.
scholarship.sentence_full: She won a scholarship because she is a great student.

transformation.definition: A complete change in appearance or character.

transformation.sentence_full: The caterpillar's transformation into a butterfly is amazing.

understanding.definition: Knowing how something works or how someone feels.

understanding.sentence_full: She has a deep understanding of how math works.

visualization.definition: Creating a picture in your mind.
visualization.sentence_blank: _____ helps me remember the story better.
visualization.sentence_full: Visualization helps me remember the story better.

wilderness.sentence_full: We went hiking in the deep wilderness.
